001import java.io.InputStream;
002import java.util.HashMap;
003import java.util.Scanner;
004
005/**
006 * Central coordinator for game state, room navigation, and command handling.
007 * <p>
008 * Responsibilities include building the world graph, maintaining the current
009 * room and a stack for the {@code back} command, delegating user input to the
010 * {@link Parser}, and driving output through the {@link UserInterface}.
011 * </p>
012 *
013 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
014 * @version 2026.02.17
015 */
016public class GameEngine
017{
018    /** Converts raw input lines into {@link Command} objects. */
019    private Parser aParser;
020    /** User-facing output and optional room imagery. */
021    private UserInterface aGui;
022    /** Player state: current room, history, and inventory. */
023    private Player aPlayer;
024
025    /**
026     * Builds the default map and creates the command parser.
027     * <p>
028     * The GUI is not set here; call {@link #setGUI(UserInterface)} after the
029     * interface exists so welcome text and images can be shown.
030     * </p>
031     */
032    public GameEngine()
033    {
034        this.createRooms();
035        this.aParser = new Parser();
036    } // GameEngine()
037
038    /**
039     * Attaches the user interface used for all player feedback.
040     *
041     * @param pUserInterface the Swing UI bound to this engine; must not be {@code null}
042     *                         for normal play
043     */
044    public void setGUI( final UserInterface pUserInterface )
045    {
046        this.aGui = pUserInterface;
047        this.printWelcome();
048    }
049
050    /**
051     * Creates every {@link Room}, connects exits, places {@link Item}s, and sets
052     * the player's starting location.
053     */
054    private void createRooms()
055    {
056        Room house, littleroot, route101, oldale, route102, petalburg, petalburgWoods, rustboro, skyPillar;
057
058        house      = new Room( "in your house in Littleroot Town", "images/home.gif", "images/home_map.jpeg" );
059        littleroot = new Room( "in Littleroot Town, your home town", "images/littleroot town.gif", "images/littleroot_map.jpeg" );
060        route101   = new Room( "on Route 101; wild Pokémon might appear in the tall grass", "images/route 101.gif", "images/route101_map.jpeg" );
061        oldale     = new Room( "in Oldale Town, a small junction with a Pokémon Center", "images/oldale town.gif", "images/oldale town_map.jpeg" );
062        route102   = new Room( "on Route 102; wild Pokémon might appear in the tall grass", "images/route 102.gif", "images/route102_map.jpeg" );
063        petalburg  = new Room( "in Petalburg City, where your father is the Gym Leader", "images/petalburg city.gif", "images/petalburg city_map.jpeg" );
064        petalburgWoods  = new Room( "in Petalburg Woods", "images/petalburg woods.gif", "images/petalburg woods_map.jpeg" );
065        rustboro   = new Room( "in Rustboro City, where the Devon Corporation is located", "images/rustboro city.gif", "images/rustboro city_map.jpeg" );
066        skyPillar  = new Room( "on the Sky Pillar, Rayquaza's home", "images/sky pillar.gif", "images/sky pilar_map.jpeg" );
067
068        house.setExit( "west", littleroot );
069
070        littleroot.setExit( "north", route101 );
071        littleroot.setExit( "east", house );
072
073        route101.setExit( "north", oldale );
074        route101.setExit( "south", littleroot );
075
076        oldale.setExit( "east", route102 );
077        oldale.setExit( "south", route101 );
078
079        route102.setExit( "north", petalburgWoods );
080        route102.setExit( "east", petalburg );
081        route102.setExit( "west", oldale );
082
083        petalburg.setExit( "north", petalburgWoods );
084        petalburg.setExit( "west", route102 );
085
086        petalburgWoods.setExit( "south", route102 );
087        petalburgWoods.setExit( "west", rustboro );
088
089        rustboro.setExit( "up", skyPillar );
090        rustboro.setExit( "east", petalburgWoods );
091        rustboro.setExit( "south", oldale );
092
093        skyPillar.setExit( "down", rustboro );
094        
095        skyPillar.setAsWinningRoom();
096
097        house.addItem( "map", new Item( "map: a map that helps you navigate.", 0 ) );
098        house.addItem( "shoes", new Item( "shoes: your shoes.", 100 ) );
099        littleroot.addItem( "grant", new Item( "grant: a student grant you obtain thanks to your grades at school, to help you on your journey.", 0 ) );
100        rustboro.addItem( "wallet", new Item( "wallet: someone's wallet; they must have left it here. It probably contains some money.", 0 ) );
101        petalburg.addItem( "delta-orb", new Item( "delta-orb: the Delta Orb, which lets you summon Rayquaza.", 150 ) );
102
103        this.aPlayer = new Player( "Luke", house );
104    } // createRooms()  
105
106    /**
107     * Moves the player in the direction given as the command's second word.
108     * <p>
109     * If the direction is missing, or there is no exit, an explanatory message is
110     * printed. Otherwise the current room is pushed onto the history stack before
111     * changing rooms, then the new description and image are shown.
112     * </p>
113     *
114     * @param pCommand a {@code go} command whose second token is the direction
115     */
116    private void goRoom( final Command pCommand )
117    {
118        if ( ! pCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
119            // If there is no second word, we don't know where to go.
120            this.aGui.println( "Go where?" );
121            return;
122        }
123
124        String vDirection = pCommand.getSecondWord();
125
126        Room vNextRoom = this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getExit( vDirection );
127
128        if ( vNextRoom == null ) {
129            this.aGui.println( "There is no door!" );
130        }
131        else {
132            this.aPlayer.moveTo( vNextRoom );
133            this.aGui.println( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getLongDescription() );
134            if ( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName() != null ) {
135                this.aGui.showImage( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName() );
136                if ( this.aPlayer.getItem( "map" ) != null ) {
137                    this.aGui.showMap( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getMapImageName() );
138                }
139            }
140
141            if ( this.aPlayer.getItem( "delta-orb" ) != null ) {
142                if ( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().isWinningRoom() ) {
143                    this.aGui.println( "\n" + "Congratulations! You just won! Thank you for playing the whole game!" );
144                }
145            }
146        }
147    } // goRoom()
148    
149    /**
150     * Moves the player back to the previous room, when possible.
151     * <p>
152     * This command does not accept a second word. If the player has no navigation
153     * history yet, an explanatory message is printed.
154     * </p>
155     *
156     * @param pCommand the {@code back} command
157     */
158    private void goBack( final Command pCommand )
159    {
160        if ( pCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
161            // If there is a second word, we don't know where to go.
162            this.aGui.println( "Back where?" );
163            return;
164        }
165
166        if ( ! this.aPlayer.canGoBack() ) {
167            this.aGui.println( "Can't go back, you just started!" );
168        }
169        else {
170            this.aPlayer.goBack();
171            this.aGui.println( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getLongDescription() );
172            if ( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName() != null ) {
173                this.aGui.showImage( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName() );
174                if ( this.aPlayer.getItem( "map" ) != null ) {
175                    this.aGui.showMap( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getMapImageName() );
176                }
177            }
178            
179            if ( this.aPlayer.getItem( "delta-orb" ) != null ) {
180                if ( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().isWinningRoom() ) {
181                    this.aGui.println( "\n" + "You want to keep winning, don't you?" );
182                }
183            }
184        }
185    } // goBack()
186
187    /**
188     * Parses and executes one player command line.
189     * <p>
190     * Recognized verbs include {@code help}, {@code go}, {@code eat}, {@code look},
191     * {@code back}, and {@code quit}. Unknown input produces a generic error message.
192     * </p>
193     *
194     * @param pCommand the raw text entered by the player (may be empty)
195     */
196    public void interpretCommand( final String pCommand )
197    {
198        this.aGui.println( "\n\n> " + pCommand + "\n" );
199        Command vCommand = this.aParser.getCommand( pCommand );
200
201        if ( vCommand.isUnknown() ) {
202            this.aGui.println( "I don't know what you mean..." );
203            return;
204        }
205
206        String vCommandWord = vCommand.getCommandWord();
207        if ( vCommandWord.equals( "help" ) ) {
208            this.printHelp();
209        }
210        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "go" ) ) {
211            this.goRoom( vCommand );
212        }
213        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "cashin" ) ) {
214            if ( vCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
215                this.cashin( vCommand );
216            }
217            else {
218                this.aGui.println( "You need something to cash in!" );
219            }
220        }
221        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "look" ) ) {
222            this.look();
223        }
224        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "take" ) ) {
225            this.take( vCommand );
226        }
227        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "drop" ) ) {
228            this.drop( vCommand );
229        }
230        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "back" ) ) {
231            if ( vCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
232                this.aGui.println( "Back what?" );
233            }
234            else {
235                this.goBack( vCommand );
236            }
237        }
238        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "inventory" ) ) {
239            if ( vCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
240                this.aGui.println( "Inventory what?" );
241            }
242            else {
243                this.inventory();
244            }
245        }
246        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "test" ) ) {
247            if ( ! vCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
248                this.aGui.println( "Need a file name!" );
249            }
250            else {
251                this.test( vCommand );
252            }
253        }
254        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "name" ) ) {
255            if ( ! vCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
256                this.aGui.println( "You need a name!" );
257            }
258            else {
259                this.name( vCommand );
260            }
261        }
262        else if ( vCommandWord.equals( "quit" ) ) {
263            if ( vCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
264                this.aGui.println( "Quit what?" );
265            }
266            else {
267                this.endGame();
268            }
269        }
270    } // interpretCommand()
271
272    /**
273     * Re-prints the full description of the room the player is standing in.
274     */
275    private void look()
276    {
277        this.aGui.println( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getLongDescription() );
278    } // look()
279
280    /**
281     * Placeholder response for the {@code cashin} command.
282     *
283     * @param pCommand the {@code cashin} command whose second word is the item key
284     */
285    private void cashin( final Command pCommand )
286    {
287        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord();
288        HashMap<String, Integer> vCashableItem = new HashMap<String, Integer>();
289        vCashableItem.put( "grant", 75 );
290        vCashableItem.put( "wallet", 25 );
291        
292        if ( vCashableItem.containsKey( vItemName ) ) {
293            Item vItem = this.aPlayer.getItem( vItemName );
294            if ( vItem != null ) {
295                int vReward = vCashableItem.get( vItemName );
296                this.aPlayer.setMoney( this.aPlayer.getMoney() + vReward );
297                this.aPlayer.removeItem( vItemName );
298                this.aGui.println( "You have cashed in your " + vItemName + " and are now richer!" );
299                this.aGui.println( "Your current money is: " + this.aPlayer.getMoney() );
300            }
301            else {
302                this.aGui.println( "You don't have a " + vItemName + " to cash in." );
303            }
304        }
305        else {
306            this.aGui.println( "You can't cash that in." );
307        }      
308    } // cashin()
309    
310    /**
311     * Changes the player's displayed name.
312     *
313     * @param pCommand the {@code name} command whose second word is the new name
314     */
315    private void name( final Command pCommand )
316    {
317        String vName = pCommand.getSecondWord();
318        this.aPlayer.setName( vName );
319        this.aGui.println( "Your new name is " + this.aPlayer.getName() + '!' );
320        this.printWelcome();
321    } // name()
322
323    /**
324     * Transfers an item from the current room into the player's inventory.
325     *
326     * @param pCommand the {@code take} command whose second word is the item key
327     */
328    private void take( final Command pCommand )
329    {
330        if ( ! pCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
331            this.aGui.println( "Take what?" );
332            return;
333        }
334        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord();
335        Item vItem = this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getItem( vItemName );
336
337        if ( vItem == null ) {
338            this.aGui.println( "I can't find any " + vItemName + "!" );
339            return;
340        }
341        if ( this.aPlayer.getMoney() >= vItem.getItemPrice() )
342        {
343            this.aPlayer.setMoney( this.aPlayer.getMoney() - vItem.getItemPrice() );
344            this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().removeItem( vItemName );
345            this.aPlayer.addItem( vItemName, vItem );
346            this.aGui.println( "Took " + vItemName + "!" );
347            if ( this.aPlayer.getItem( "map" ) != null ) {
348                this.aGui.showMap( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getMapImageName() );
349            }
350        }
351        else
352        {
353            this.aGui.println( vItemName + " is too expensive for you right now!" );
354        }
355    } // take()
356
357    /**
358     * Transfers an item from the player's inventory back into the current room.
359     *
360     * @param pCommand the {@code drop} command whose second word is the item key
361     */
362    private void drop( final Command pCommand )
363    {
364        if ( ! pCommand.hasSecondWord() ) {
365            this.aGui.println( "Drop what?" );
366            return;
367        }
368        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord();
369        Item vItem = this.aPlayer.getItem( vItemName );
370        if ( vItem == null ) {
371            this.aGui.println( "I can't find any " + vItemName + "!" );
372            return;
373        }
374        this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().addItem( vItemName, vItem );
375        this.aPlayer.removeItem( vItemName );
376        this.aGui.println( "Dropped " + vItemName + "!" );
377        this.aPlayer.setMoney( this.aPlayer.getMoney() + vItem.getItemPrice() );
378        if ( this.aPlayer.getItem( "map" ) == null ) {
379            this.aGui.showMap( "images/no map.jpeg" );
380        }
381    } // drop()
382
383    /**
384     * Ends the session by printing a farewell line and disabling further input.
385     */
386    private void endGame()
387    {
388        this.aGui.println( "Thank you for playing! Goodbye." );
389        this.aGui.enable( false );
390        System.exit( 0 );
391    }
392
393    /**
394     * Runs a sequence of commands from a text file packaged as a classpath resource.
395     * <p>
396     * The engine will interpret each line as if the player had typed it.
397     * </p>
398     *
399     * @param pCommand the {@code test} command whose second word is the base filename
400     */
401    private void test( final Command pCommand )
402    {
403        String vFileName = pCommand.getSecondWord();
404        vFileName = vFileName + ".txt";
405
406        InputStream vIS = this.getClass().getClassLoader().getResourceAsStream( vFileName );
407
408        if ( vIS == null ) {
409            System.out.println( "File not found: " + vFileName );
410            return;
411        }
412
413        Scanner vSC = new Scanner( vIS );
414
415        while ( vSC.hasNextLine() ) {
416            String vLigne = vSC.nextLine();
417            this.interpretCommand( vLigne );
418        }
419        
420        vSC.close();
421    } // test()
422
423    /**
424     * Prints the welcome banner, initial location text, and the starting room image
425     * when one is configured.
426     */
427    private void printWelcome()
428    {
429        this.aGui.print( "\n" );
430        this.aGui.println( "Hello " + this.aPlayer.getName() + "!" );
431        this.aGui.println( "You can change your name with the command: name <new name>." );
432        this.aGui.println( "Welcome to the world of Pokémon!" );
433        this.aGui.println( "A wonderful world where you can live an adventure!" );
434        this.aGui.println( "Type 'help' if you need help." );
435        this.printLocationInfo();
436        if ( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName() != null ) {
437            this.aGui.showImage( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName() );
438        }
439        if ( this.aPlayer.getItem( "map" ) == null ) {
440            this.aGui.showMap( "images/no map.jpeg" );
441        }
442    } // printWelcome()
443
444    /**
445     * Prints short narrative context and the list of valid command words.
446     */
447    private void printHelp()
448    {
449        this.aGui.println( "Hello " + this.aPlayer.getName() + "!" );
450        this.aGui.println( "You are in the wonderful world of Pokémon." );
451        this.aGui.println( "You are trying to stop Rayquaza from destroying Hoenn." );
452        this.aGui.println( "Your command words are:" );
453        this.aGui.println( this.aParser.getCommandString() );
454    } // printHelp()
455
456    /**
457     * Prints the long description of the current room (including exits and items).
458     */
459    private void printLocationInfo()
460    {
461        this.aGui.print( this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getLongDescription() );
462    } // printLocationInfo()
463
464    /**
465     * Prints the player's inventory summary (items and total value).
466     */
467    private void inventory()
468    {
469        this.aGui.println( this.aPlayer.getItemInventory() );
470    } // inventory()
471} // GameEngine
